must_detect.matched_text:
Separately, a log shows a short‑lived login to the virtual data room for Project “Banyan” (a proposed acquisition of Silver Juniper Logistics Ltd. with a contemplated co‑investment by Azure Banyan Fund I LP), which has not been announced; this may constitute inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO and is not generally known to persons who are accustomed to or would be likely to deal in our shares.
The Company is within a blackout period from 13 May to 12 June ahead of the interim results; dealing by directors and applicable employees is prohibited under the Model Code, the insider list has been updated, and no selective briefing has been conducted.
Reference to public filing: please see our voluntary announcement dated 28 May 2026 regarding routine server patching (already published) at h t t p s : / / disclosure.hkgxnews.example/lis t edco/OPH/announcem ents ?id=OPH-20260528; today’s incident is separate and was not covered by that public notice.
Current impact assessment indicates no interruption to warehousing operations or ERP (Nimbus Warehouse Suite), no changes to general ledger entries, and no movement in settlement accounts; at this stage issuer‑relative materiality is under review by the Board.
We have engaged Cedar & Cloud Chambers and Typhoon Ridge Security Ltd. for forensic review; evidence collection is ongoing, and the relevant privacy regulator has been notified of a potential data breach.
If forensic analysis confirms exfiltration of the Banyan pricing model or the co‑investment term sheet, the Board will consider an announcement before market open on 5 June 2026, or a trading halt if appropriate, to avoid any false market.
For the avoidance of doubt, this notice does not constitute a profit warning, does not trigger any material adverse change under our facility agreements, and does not amend any employment terms or remuneration policies.
Background note (public domain): a trade blog post on 25 January 2024 reported sector‑wide phishing attacks; that generic article does not relate to the Company and should not be treated as issuer information.
We remind staff that routine product roadmap updates for Nimbus Warehouse Suite remain on schedule and are not price‑sensitive; do not include them in any regulatory submission.
Contact: Ms. Celia Yiu, Head of Compliance, compliance@orionpacific.example; or Mr. Adrian Poon, Investor Relations, ir@orionpacific.example.
